SeguroTools

Calculators

Educational calculators for life, ACA, final expense, home, disability, pet, auto, and small business insurance.

Life insurance needs calculator

Estimate a coverage range using DIME and income replacement logic.

Use calculator

Final expense planning calculator

Estimate funeral, travel, debt, and immediate cash needs.

Use calculator

ACA subsidy planning estimator

Estimate FPL percentage and a rough premium tax credit planning range.

Use calculator

Home and renters coverage gap calculator

Estimate personal property, additional living expense, liability, and flood gaps.

Use calculator

Disability income gap calculator

Estimate monthly income replacement and elimination-period cash needs.

Use calculator

Pet insurance break-even calculator

Compare annual premiums, deductibles, reimbursement, and emergency funds.

Use calculator

Auto liability gap worksheet

Compare assets, income, state minimums, current limits, and rideshare gaps.

Use calculator

Small business insurance gap worksheet

Estimate liability, contract, payroll, and equipment gaps for small businesses.

Use calculator

SeguroTools

Insurance calculators and plain-English guides for U.S. households.

Educational estimate only. This site does not sell insurance, negotiate coverage, or provide legal, tax, financial, or insurance advice.
